name: Joan Marie Laurer aka Chyna
title: Last known image of Chyna, a video still taken from social media in 2016, shortly before she was found dead in her apartment.
description: Chyna, born Joan Marie Laurer, was captured in a video still from social media in April 2016, during the final days of her life. On April 20, 2016, her manager found her unresponsive in her apartment in Redondo Beach, California. The cause of death was ruled an accidental overdose of a combination of alcohol, diazepam, and oxycodone. She was 46 years old. Chyna had been a groundbreaking figure in professional wrestling, becoming the first woman to enter the Royal Rumble match and the only woman to hold the WWE Intercontinental Championship.
bio: Chyna, born Joan Marie Laurer, was an American professional wrestler, actress, and bodybuilder. She was a trailblazer for women in professional wrestling, becoming the first woman to enter the Royal Rumble and hold the Intercontinental Championship.
